Description: A high-voltage Electrical Engineer who specializes in renewable energy and refuses to use anything but a static-electricity-powered toaster. He’s shockingly good at his job and never resists a good circuit joke. Punchline: Why did Max get grounded? Because he had too much potential!

A sharp-witted Security Consultant who is literally paid to be 'on the fence' about everything. She can crack a firewall faster than an egg and has a personality that’s a bit prickly. Punchline: She’s the only person who can say 'I'll be back' and actually make the intruders stay away.

An Insurance Actuary who lives life with three spare tires and a life jacket in his bathtub. He’s the guy who brings a fire extinguisher to a birthday party. Punchline: Justin doesn’t play hide and seek because good luck hiding from a guy who’s already mapped out every exit strategy!

A world-class Pastry Chef who rises to every occasion, though she occasionally has a bit of a meltdown under pressure. She’s famous for her delicate cakes. Punchline: What’s Sue’s favorite workout? Churning butter—it’s a real whisk-taker!

A classic car restorer who thinks 'hybrid' is a dirty word. He’s got a 'clutch' personality and never gets tired of 'wheely' bad puns. Punchline: Why did Otto sleep under his car? He wanted to wake up oily!

A professional Florist who is literally blooming with ideas. She’s the kind of person who talks to her ferns. Punchline: Flora’s business is growing rapidly, but she still finds time to stop and smell the profits!

A Pro-Wrestler turned Kindergarten Teacher who can bench press a minivan but struggles with opening juice boxes. Punchline: Why did Hugh bring a ladder to school? Because he wanted to go to high school!
An aspiring Librarian and novelist who lives her life by the book. She once tried to shush a thunderstorm. Punchline: Why was Paige so good at basketball? She knew how to work the 'volumes'!

A Silicon Valley AI researcher who is 90% caffeine and 10% neural network. He’s a bit robotic in social settings. Punchline: Why did Artie break up with his GPS? Because it kept recalculating their relationship!
A Marine Biologist who is a bit of a salty character. She spends more time underwater than on land. Punchline: Why won't Ann share her seafood? Because she’s a little 'shell-fish'!
A cheese-steak connoisseur and professional city guide. He is a 'grate' friend but very cheesy. Punchline: Phil tried to take a nap in a clock factory, but he just ended up working 'overtime'!
A fruit farmer who is always in a 'jam.' She’s sweet, seedless, and hates being the 'currant' center of attention. Punchline: Why did Berry go to the doctor? She wasn't 'peeling' well!
A competitive eater who loves a good BBQ. He’s always the 'weiner' in his group of friends. Punchline: What did Frank say to the hot dog? 'It’s nice to 'meat' you'!
A chocolatier who has a 'meltdown' every Monday. She’s sweet but has a very hard outer shell. Punchline: Why did Candy join the band? Because she had the 'sweetest' notes!
An archeologist who is always looking for 'ground-breaking' discoveries. He lives in the past. Punchline: Why did Doug get kicked out of the library? He was 'digging' for information!
A financial auditor who counts her grains of rice. She thinks 'splurging' is buying the 2-ply toilet paper. Punchline: Why doesn't Penny tell secrets? Because she’s 'saving' them for a rainy day!
A nomadic travel vlogger who hasn't seen a shower in three countries. He’s a bit of a 'dirt-bag' but has a heart of gold. Punchline: Why did Dusty cross the road? To see where the 'dirt' led!
A peace activist who is always extending a branch. She’s very well-rooted and loves a good press. Punchline: Why did Olive go to the party? To get a little 'pitted'!
A motivational speaker who has never eaten a donut. He’s strong-willed, but his jokes are weak. Punchline: Why did Will go to the gym? To work on his 'will-power'!
A professional psychic who knew you were going to read this. She’s very clear about the future but hazy on the past. Punchline: Why did Crystal get fired? She didn't see it coming!

A professional Deep Sea Diver who is under a lot of pressure but never cracks. He’s a 'bottom-feeder' in the best way possible and has a very 'fluid' personality. He’s currently writing a book about the ocean—it’s a real page-turner if you like wet ink. Punchline: Why did Barry get a promotion? Because he was outstanding in his 'field' of seaweed!

A Landscape Architect who is always 'rooting' for the underdog. She has a thorny exterior but is a real sweetheart once you dig deep. She refuses to date anyone who doesn't have a 'growing' bank account. Punchline: Why was Rose so good at her job? Because she always knew how to 'hedge' her bets!

An Aromatherapist who is always making 'scents' of things. He’s a very 'volatile' character if you don't like his oils. He spends his weekends smelling things he shouldn't and claims he can identify a person’s mood by their 'odor-graph.' Punchline: What did Frank say to the lavender? 'I’m 'scent'-imental about you'!

A professional Philosophy Professor who specializes in existential dread. When you ask her a question, she gives you three more questions as an answer. She’s very indecisive—she once spent four hours at a salad bar questioning if the croutons truly 'existed.' Punchline: Why did Ida fail as a detective? Because she kept saying 'I-da know'!

A Lumberjack who is a real 'chip' off the old block. He’s a 'log-ical' thinker and never barks up the wrong tree. He’s currently in a relationship, but it’s 'knot' very serious. Punchline: Why did Tim go to the dentist? Because he had a 'cavity' in his trunk!

An Ultra-Marathon Runner who has literally been 'to hell and back'—or at least that’s what it says on her race bib. she’s incredibly fit and has a 'running' commentary for everything. She’s faster than a rumor. Punchline: Why did Helen take a map to bed? She wanted to 'run' through her dreams!

A Geologist who thinks 'diamonds' are just rocks that worked hard. He’s a bit of a 'dark' character but has a glowing personality when he’s around a lamp. He’s always 'digging' for a compliment. Punchline: Why did Cole get a promotion? Because he was at the 'coal-face' of innovation!

An Air Traffic Controller who is always in a 'flighty' mood. She’s great at handling stress, but her personal life is in a bit of a 'tailspin.' She refuses to date anyone who doesn't have 'clearance.' Punchline: Why was May so good at her job? Because she never 'landed' herself in trouble!

A Monastery Librarian who is as quiet as a mouse and twice as fast at eating acorns. He’s a 'nutty' character who has taken a vow of silence—except on Fridays, when he sings 'Alvin and the Chipmunks' hits. Punchline: Why did Chip go to the psychiatrist? He had 'monk-ey' business on his mind!

A Herpetologist with a 'squeeze-y' personality. She’s very flexible and has a 'venomous' wit if you cross her. She loves a good 'hiss-tory' book and hates anything that 'rattles' her. Punchline: Why did Anna break up with the python? He was too 'wrapped up' in himself!

A Tax Lawyer who is always looking for a 'hole' in the argument. He’s a very 'shifty' character who knows how to 'bracket' his emotions. He’s currently dating a CPA—they’re a 'deductible' pair. Punchline: Why did Lou go to the gym? To work on his 'tax-flexing'!

A Vertical Mobility Specialist who has her 'ups and downs' daily. She’s a very 'uplifting' person to be around, but she can be a bit 'pushy' about which floor you choose. She’s currently looking for a relationship that’s 'on the level.' Punchline: Why did Ella quit her job? It was too 'descending' for her!

A Stand-up Comedian who is always 'kidding' around. He’s a real 'pun-isher' when it comes to humor and never 'serious-ly' considers anything. He’s currently working on a book about why 'sarcasm is the lowest form of wit' (he’s being sarcastic). Punchline: Why was Joe so bad at hide and seek? Because he was always 'cracking' up!

A Health Coach and Trekkie who believes in 'prospering' and eating kale. She has a 'vulcan'-like discipline and refuses to eat anything with 'logic' (by which she means sugar). She’s currently training for a marathon on Mars. Punchline: Why did Liv go to the party? To 'prosper' the hors d'oeuvres!

A Construction Foreman who is always 'leveling' with you. He’s a 'solid' guy who never 'bricks' it under pressure. He’s currently building a house made of playing cards—he calls it his 'deck' house. Punchline: Why did Bill get a raise? Because he was 'foundational' to the company!

A Professional Surfer and Lifeguard who is a bit of a 'shore' thing. She’s very 'current' with the news and hates anything 'drifting' away from the point. She spends her life in a bikini and thinks shoes are a 'conspiracy.' Punchline: Why did Sandy get a tan? Because she was 'sun-sational'!

A Sci-Fi prop maker who is always 'beaming' with pride. He’s a 'blast' to be around and has a 'laser' focus on his work. He’s currently building a time machine—he’ll tell you about it yesterday. Punchline: Why did Ray get fired? He was too 'spacey' during meetings!

A Squirrel rehabilitator who is a bit 'cracked.' She’s very 'shelled' off until you get to know her, and then she’s just 'nutty.' She refuses to eat anything that doesn't have a 'crunch.' Punchline: Why did Hazel go to the bank? To stash her 'acorns'!

An Italian Chef who is a bit 'firm' with his staff. He’s a 'pasta-master' who never 'sauces' around. He’s currently writing a cookbook titled 'The Penne is Mightier Than the Sword.' Punchline: Why did Al get a ticket? Because he was caught 'past-a' the speed limit!

A Precision Engineer who is a bit 'short' with people. She’s very 'calculated' and never misses a 'point.' She’s currently designing a ruler that only measures in 'smiles.' Punchline: Why did Milly get a promotion? Because she was a 'measured' success!

A sophisticated Theatre Actor with a voice like velvet and a collection of shawls that would make a Himalayan goat jealous. He spends his mornings practicing elocution and his evenings debating the finer points of Ray's cinematography. Punchline: Why does Anirban never play hide and seek? Because a talent like his simply cannot be hidden!

A Senior Architect who specializes in restoring heritage 'Bonedi Bari' mansions. She can tell the age of a brick just by looking at it and has a zero-tolerance policy for modern glass buildings. Punchline: Indrani doesn't need a GPS; she just follows the scent of history (and fresh 'Kachori')!

A world-renowned Sitarist who once accidentally tuned his instrument to the frequency of a nearby radio station. He is incredibly humble, unless you suggest that a guitar is just a 'modern sitar.' Punchline: Why did Parthiv sit on the floor during the meeting? He wanted to stay grounded in his roots!

A classical Odissi dancer who can express 47 different emotions using only her eyebrows. She is the life of every 'Bijoya Sammelani' and makes the best 'Nolen Gur' soufflé in the city. Punchline: Sreemoyee tried to quit dancing once, but she just kept 'stepping' back into it!

A passionate Cricket Coach who believes every problem in life can be solved with a good 'cover drive.' He owns seventeen jerseys of the same team and refuses to wash his 'lucky' socks during the playoffs. Punchline: Why did Soumyo bring a bat to bed? In case he had to 'hit' the lights!

A Documentary Filmmaker who travels to the remotest parts of the Sundarbans to film tigers. She is braver than most, except when she sees a cockroach in her kitchen. Punchline: Tanushree’s films are always moving... mostly because she forgot to use a tripod!

A Data Scientist by day and a 'Kobiyal' (poet-singer) by night. He can explain complex algorithms through folk songs, which makes his office presentations very rhythmic and slightly confusing. Punchline: Why did Ritwik cross-reference his dinner? He wanted to ensure the 'Panch Phoron' was statistically significant!

A brilliant Astrophysicist who compares the density of stars to the thickness of her mother’s 'Ilish Macher Jhol.' She spends her nights gazing at the cosmos and her days complaining about the humidity. Punchline: Madhurima is great at parties; she always knows how to take up 'space'!

A veteran 'Pata Chitra' artist who keeps the traditional scroll painting alive. He is a master storyteller who can recite an entire epic while painting a three-inch bird. Punchline: Why did Arup buy a larger canvas? Because his stories were too big for his britches!

A high-school History Teacher who can make the Battle of Plassey sound like a modern-day soap opera. She is famous for her 'look of doom' that can silence a classroom in 0.2 seconds. Punchline: Why did Basanti carry a ruler? To show the students that she was the 'measure' of authority!

A creative Director for a top ad agency. He thinks in metaphors and speaks in taglines. He once convinced a man to buy a sweater in the middle of a May heatwave in Kolkata. Punchline: Probal’s ideas are like 'Luchi'—always puffed up and full of hot air!

An environmental lawyer who fights for the preservation of the wetlands. She is as tough as a 'Sundari' tree and twice as hard to move when she has made up her mind. Punchline: Why does Keya love the wetlands? Because she never gets 'bogged' down by the details!

A goldsmith from the famous jewelry district. He has the patience of a saint and eyes that can spot a 0.1% impurity from across the room. He is very 'refined.' Punchline: Why did Suvendu become a jeweler? Because he wanted a job with a lot of 'sparkle'!

A professional food photographer who can make a simple 'Aloo Posto' look like a Renaissance painting. She is often found standing on chairs in restaurants to get the perfect 'flat lay.' Punchline: Aditi is the only person who eats her food only after it’s 'cold' and 'captured'!

A legendary football fan who still claims the 1970s was the golden era of the sport. He can recite the entire lineup of the Mohun Bagan team from thirty years ago but forgets his own wedding anniversary. Punchline: Why did Bikram bring a whistle to dinner? To call a 'foul' on the lack of salt!

A Yoga instructor who believes that the secret to eternal youth is 'Pranayama' and avoiding 'Hilsa' bones. She is incredibly flexible, except when it comes to her morning routine. Punchline: Why did Paramita start yoga? She wanted to see life from a different 'angle'!

A sculptor who creates the massive Durga idols for the Pujas. He lives on tea and nicotine for three months a year and treats the clay like it's his own child. Punchline: Sudip is very 'handy' to have around, especially when things need 'molding'!

A travel blogger who specializes in 'offbeat' Bengal. She has visited every district and can tell you where to find the best 'Langcha' in Shaktigarh. Punchline: Why did Nabanita buy a compass? She wanted to find a 'direct' route to the nearest sweet shop!

A retired bureaucrat who spends his days writing letters to the editor about the declining quality of public transportation. He wears a sweater even when the temperature is 30°C. Punchline: Bhaskar doesn't argue; he just provides 'official' corrections!

A professional 'Alpana' artist who can turn a plain floor into a masterpiece in minutes. She is very traditional but uses an iPad to sketch her designs first. Punchline: Mousumi’s life is very colorful, but she always stays within the 'lines'!
